title: mypy: 11 no-untyped-def errors (missing return types)
description:
11 no-untyped-def errors for functions missing type annotations:
- src/lichen/interface/serial.py: lines 58, 83, 105, 164
- src/lichen/interface/kiss/serial.py: lines 61, 86, 105, 154
- src/lichen/interface/kiss/payload_fmt.py: line 104
- src/lichen/coap/udp_server.py: line 25
- src/lichen/coap/node_channel.py: line 40

Fix: Add return type annotations (most are -> None or -> bytes).
